items.title: Transfer rumors, news: Liverpool eye Wharton amid Man United, Real Madrid interest
items.summary: Liverpool face competition from Manchester United and Real Madrid to sign Crystal Palace midfielder Adam Wharton. Transfer Talk has the latest.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Pakistan appoints Sarfaraz Ahmed as head coach for Bangladesh Test tour, recalls Mohammad Abbas
items.summary: Pakistan Cricket Board announces the squad which includes uncapped batters Abdullah Fazal, Azan Awais, all-rounder Amad Butt and wicketkeeper Ghazi Ghouri
